mapper.select: SELECT b.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, bct.blog_cate_nm AS blog_cate_nm, prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm FROM cm_bltn b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN cm_bltn_cate bct ON bct.blog_cate_id = b.blog_cate_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = b.prod_id WHERE b.blog_id = #{id}
